GG0130E3_SHWR_BTHE_END_CD GG0130E3 Self Care: Shower/Bathe Ability at Discharge Indicates the patient's ability to shower/bathe self at discharge. 06. Independent – Patient completes the activity by him/herself with no assistance from a helper.
05. Setup or clean-up assistance – Helper sets up or cleans up; patient completes activity. Helper assists only prior to or following the activity.
04. Supervision
